experiments

Labs

Exploratory work, benchmarks, and half-finished ideas. Not everything here is polished — that's the point.

  • active

    pgvector Benchmarks

    Performance testing cosine similarity queries across 1M, 5M, and 10M embedding vectors. Comparing IVFFLAT vs HNSW index strategies.

    PostgreSQLpgvectorPython #embeddings#benchmarks
  • active

    LLM Prompt Caching Patterns

    Exploring cost and latency gains from Claude prompt caching across multi-step document processing pipelines.

    Claude APINode.js #llm#optimization
  • paused

    Self-hosted Observability Stack

    Running Grafana + Prometheus + Loki on a single DigitalOcean droplet for personal infrastructure monitoring.

    GrafanaPrometheusLokiDocker #devops#observability
